# Elusion Works

Elusion Works is the umbrella brand and index for websites, tools, hubs, and future games by Kol Tregaskes.

- Primary page: `/`
- Showcase routes:
  - `/experiments/`
  - `/creative-radar/`
  - `/remix-relay/`
  - `/design-notes/`
- Content model: static index plus small public showcase routes
- Focus: websites, hubs, tools, experiments, curation formats, and future interactive work
